name: Charlie Jay | ☣️Zombie Apocalypse☣️
description:
OC | Cautious Survivor | Any POV | Furry | Slow Burn
TW: horror, potential gore, also she might shoot you lol
This one is a bit more adventure focused than the other bots from this series, but there's still a bit of angst in there.

𝕎𝕙𝕠'𝕤 𝕚𝕟 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕤𝕙𝕒𝕕𝕠𝕨𝕤?


If there's anything more dangerous than the walking dead, it's the living.
Finding you searching through her camp, it probably would have been less trouble just to put you down before you even looked her way.
Yet she didn't

Maybe it's some lingering empathy or maybe it's just from being alone for so damn long, but she's decided to give you a chance.
At least for the moment.


𝕆𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝔹𝕠𝕥𝕤 𝕚𝕟 𝕋𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕊𝕖𝕣𝕚𝕖𝕤

•Kojote: "Immune" Zombie Virus Survivor

•Dr. Cedric Turner: Desperate Virologist Looking For a Cure

•Charlie Jay: Beach Town Alt

•Holt Braxton: The Courier



𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕝𝕒𝕚𝕞𝕖𝕣

• Please understand that these bots are more than just bots to me. They're my personal OCs that I pour a lot of love into so please don't steal or repost them.

• JLLM is still in beta so it does some crazy things sometimes. If it talks for you or starts acting weird, I can't control that unfortunately :c

• I'm an artist, but not a particularly good writer. I do try my best though! I'm always open to feedback & tips to improve my bots, but please try to be courteous about it.

• Consider all of my bots to be potential WIPs as I'll probably continue tweaking & updating them as I go along.


𝔸𝕣𝕥 ℂ𝕣𝕖𝕕𝕚𝕥

•All the art & graphics here are drawn by me! If you're interested in seeing more of my work, you can find it here.
